title: HStack
description: Stack shortcut with horizontal direction. Useful to line up items in a row with consistent spacing and alignment.

spacings.title: Spacings
spacings.desc: System tokens: xsmall, small, medium, large.

alignments.title: Alignments
alignments.desc: Combine justify and align for different layouts.

wrapping.title: Wrapping
wrapping.desc: Enable wrap so children break when there's no space.

props.wrap: Line-break behavior when there's no space.
props.divider: Inserts a vertical Divider between each child.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for the horizontal stack
a11y.focusNative: Non-interactive layout element; does not participate in the tab order
